title: Proximity Mine Type A
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ProximityMineA-XWA.jpg|150px|right]]
A '''Proximity Mine Type A''' was a special anti-[[Starship/Legends|ship]] weapon that was laid in known [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|lanes]]. When a ship would approach the mine, it would detonate and thus damage the ship, frequently destroying its targets.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

[[Category:Space mines]]
